title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six Claude skills for improving project output: web scraping to discover data, /ingest-source to build knowledge bases, /improve-system for iterative refinement, /ask-the-board for multi-perspective advice, /internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The workflow is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
